title: Aureline starter side-effect envelope: preflight action taxonomy and plain-open vs starter diff
description: Boundary schema for starter_preflight_action_record as frozen in docs/workflow/starter_side_effect_envelope.md. The record captures the starter side-effect envelope as a diff between a same-weight plain-open lane (open/clone/create without starter) and the starter-assisted lane. It classifies every immediate and deferred action using a closed starter_preflight_action_class taxonomy (file generation, dependency restore, package install, extension install, remote provisioning, secret/auth request, trust grant, script/task execution) and requires an explicit partition into actions_run_now vs actions_deferred, plus a reapproval posture for deferred actions. Raw absolute paths, raw repository URLs with embedded credentials, raw secrets, raw tokens, raw package-manager command lines, raw scripts, and raw extension marketplace URLs never cross this boundary; instances carry opaque ids, closed vocabulary, and short reviewable sentences only. Adding a new starter_preflight_action_class, execution_commitment_class, timing_class, reapproval_posture_class, bypass_path_id, or side_effect_scope_class value is additive-minor and bumps starter_preflight_action_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

starter_preflight_action_schema_version.description: Integer schema version. Current value is 1.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable id safe for previews, fixtures, support exports, and logs. Raw paths, URLs, and secrets never appear here.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence already scrubbed by the producer. Must not contain raw secrets, raw command lines, or raw absolute paths.

side_effect_scope_class.description: Closed set naming the scope an action mutates. Matches the scope vocabulary used by workflow bundle change previews.

starter_preflight_action_class.description: Closed starter preflight action taxonomy. The class is the user-facing category; fine-grained details belong to the specialized scaffold, bootstrap, and execution contracts.

execution_commitment_class.description: Whether Aureline will execute the action, will offer a user-initiated action later, or will only recommend an external/manual step.

timing_class.description: Closed timing classification for action execution. Mirrors the immediate-vs-deferred partition vocabulary used by scaffolding preflights.

reapproval_posture_class.description: Whether deferred execution requires reapproval later (trust, secrets/auth, provider scope, privileged execution).

bound_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to the underlying record that supplies detailed disclosure (e.g., a bootstrap_queue_item_record id, a declared_setup_task id, a hook id, a policy ticket ref).

starter_preflight_action_row.description: One preflight action row. A surface that collapses an action into free-form copy is non-conforming.

starter_lane_claim_class.description: Whether the record represents a plain-open lane only, or a starter-assisted lane that adds delta actions.

plain_open_baseline.description: Baseline disclosure for the same-weight open-without-starter lane.

starter_added_delta.description: Delta disclosure: actions the starter lane adds beyond the plain-open baseline.

bypass_path_ids.description: Bypass paths advertised at the same weight as the starter lane on the surface that renders this record.

starter_preflight_action_record.description: Starter preflight action envelope record. Surfaces render this before commit; it is the contract that prevents hidden side effects behind a generic Create button.
